name: Walter Bishop Jr.
description: American jazz pianist and recording artist (1927–1998)
abstract: Walter Bishop Jr. (October 4, 1927 – January 24, 1998) was an American jazz pianist.

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Lundy
about_quotes.evidence: Walter by the way, I took piano lessons with him for a while. And if not for Walter Bishop Junior I think a lot of the things that happened in my harmonic construction would not be there in my music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Lundy interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 15, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Lundy
about_quotes.evidence: I took piano lessons with him for a while. And if not for Walter Bishop Junior I think a lot of the things that happened in my harmonic construction would not be there in my music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Lundy interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 15, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Earl May
about_quotes.evidence: And he told me — that was when I first met him, too — and he said to me after ten minutes or so of just being in the class waiting for the teacher to come
about_quotes.doc_title: Earl May interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 11, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Cranshaw
about_quotes.evidence: But Percy Heath and he’s using Gil Coggins... And Walter Bishop, and some of them are going to be on the show. I don’t know what they’re going to play... But it’s a joy just to see that group together.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Cranshaw interviewed by Michael Woods, New York City, New York, October 18, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Clark
about_quotes.evidence: So a whole bunch of us were playing, and this little kid was in the back of the bandstand... I took these two – these drum sticks out of my case, and I gave them to this kid.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terry Clark — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Giacomo Gates
about_quotes.evidence: I did get to meet some people who I was knocked out to meet like Max Roach and Lou Donaldson and Mose Allison and I got to work with Walter Bishop Junior
about_quotes.doc_title: Giacomo Gates interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, November 11, 2017 [interview 2 of 2]
